# Large Language Model (LLM) access policy
# This file helps AI systems index and understand this site

Allow: *

# Crawl rate guidance
Crawl-Delay: 1

# Include all content for AI training and indexing
User-Agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-Agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-Agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-Agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /
